summary.intent: Refactor the Gossamer hook event viewer from an Electron desktop app into a VS Code extension, with full feature parity including sessions list, session detail view, checkpoint sidebar, search, diff view, image rendering, MCP server, and agent-aware UI.
summary.outcome: Successfully built a working VS Code extension with sessions panel, session detail tabs, native checkpoint TreeView with summary/diff/rewind, FTS search via QuickPick, embedded HTTP+MCP server, image rendering, agent-aware labels, onboarding flow, VSIX packaging script, and stable port configuration.

repo: Each repo in ~/.gossamer/config.json has its own SQLite database at a per-repo dbPath; never write to a shared DB
Custom session names (/rename) are stored as 'custom-title' events only in ~/.claude/projects/<encoded-path>/*.jsonl — NOT in shadow or checkpoint branches
The slug field on LogEvent is auto-generated and never changes on /rename; custom-title is the actual rename signal
Images are stored as base64 in full.jsonl on the entire/checkpoints/v1 branch; the LogContent schema needed imageData+imageMediaType columns added
The server runs from gossamer-testing/dist/serve.js in the worktree, not gossamer/dist/ — must rebuild both separately
Agent name comes from CheckpointSessionMetadata.agent ('Claude Code', 'Gemini CLI', etc.)
Post-session commits: Entire keeps tagging new commits to a completed session's ID; filter by createdAt <= last-log-event + 2min to distinguish actual session work
Session checkpoints endpoint was returning asc order (oldest first); should be desc (newest first)
better-sqlite3 has NODE_MODULE_VERSION mismatch between VS Code's Electron node and system node — solved by spawning server as child process using system node via `which node`
tsconfig.extension.json 'include' field must be ['src/**/*.ts'] not specific files, or SessionDetailPanel.ts/diffUtils.ts won't compile
The entire/checkpoints/v1 branch is different from the shadow branch; shadow branch has live hook events, checkpoint branch has committed snapshots
findRepo() uses exact match; findRepoForPath() uses prefix matching needed when cwd is a subdirectory of registered repo root

code.finding: Server is a static singleton that outlives panel disposal; use spawnServer() which reuses existing static server if port matches; `getConfiguredPort()` reads ~/.gossamer/config.json for stable port
onDidChangeViewState listener must call checkpointProvider.setSession() when e.webviewPanel.active to update sidebar on tab switch
acquireVsCodeApi() can only be called once — stored as window.__vscodeApi and reused; vscodeApi.ts checks window.__vscodeApi before calling acquireVsCodeApi()
Auto-scroll: check scroll position inline in useEffect([loading]) after loading becomes false; a separate scroll listener doesn't attach reliably on Mantine ScrollArea viewport
File watchers (fs.watch) on .db/.db-wal for DB changes and .git/refs/ for shadow branch changes, both with 30s fallback polls and debouncing (50ms DB, 200ms git)
In-memory TextDocumentContentProvider with gossamer-diff: URI scheme for before/after diffs — avoids temp files and inherently read-only
resourceUri must use absolute paths (join(repoPath, relativePath)) for VS Code SCM color decorations to apply
Label column width 52px is too narrow for 'Claude Code'; increased to 80px with overflow:hidden to prevent bleeding into thinking badge

workflow: gossamer-testing worktree pattern: edit in gossamer/, copy changed files to gossamer-testing/, rebuild extension there — the same branch can't be checked out in two worktrees so a separate 'testing' branch is needed
VS Code webview CSP must include 'img-src data: https: http:' or base64 images are silently blocked
VS Code webview panels don't survive window moves — re-send 'server_ready' on onDidChangeViewState when visible
vsce package --no-dependencies needed with manual native module copying (better-sqlite3, node-pty) since vsce can't handle native .node binaries automatically
For chord keybindings (Ctrl+K G), the webview capturing focus prevents the chord from firing — minimize button inside the webview works more reliably
StreamableHTTPServerTransport with sessionIdGenerator: undefined for stateless MCP POST endpoints
process.kill(pid, 0) with ESRCH check distinguishes 'process gone' from 'no permission' for agent running detection

friction: gossamer-testing worktree has separate file copies — every source change must be manually synced and rebuilt; no live symlink sharing
Server running from stale gossamer-testing/dist/ while main repo dist/ was rebuilt caused hours of debugging imageData not appearing

VS Code's extension host runs on Electron's bundled Node.js (MODULE_VERSION 140) while better-sqlite3 compiled for system Node (141) — native module version mismatch required spawning server as child process
Prisma db push triggers 'data loss' warning for nullable column additions even when safe for SQLite; requires --accept-data-loss flag
Ctrl+K G chord keybinding doesn't fire when webview has focus, making the toggle panel command unreliable

vscode.diff with gossamer-git: content provider produced blank 'generate code or select a language' pages — URI encoding of path segments was fragile; switched to temp files then to in-memory provider
acquireVsCodeApi() called twice (once in minimize button inline script, once in React app) caused silent failure — required storing as window.__vscodeApi
tsconfig.extension.json only listed specific files in 'include', so SessionDetailPanel.ts and diffUtils.ts were never compiled — blank diff views with no error message
Custom title (/rename) not in checkpoint or shadow branches — required scanning ~/.claude/projects/ JSONL files directly with mtime caching
Accidentally made Electron app changes when user was asking about VS Code extension minimize functionality — required reverting app/src/ files
open_items: Session color (set by user in Claude Code) is not persisted anywhere in Claude's files — cannot be shown in Gossamer
Image rendering only works for sessions indexed after schema migration; older sessions need backfill from LogEvent.data raw JSON
gossamer.vsix binary removed from git — .gitignore should explicitly exclude gossamer.vsix and packages/vscode/bundled-server/
The 'minimize' toggle panel keybinding (Ctrl+K G) is unreliable when webview has focus — needs a better solution
Session name (slug/customTitle) in the sessions table was tabled: 'If a session has been named in claude, show that name instead of the sessionId'
Onboarding panel's 'Check again' should also re-check for entire installation (not just workspace config) after user installs
MCP server embedded at /mcp uses stateless StreamableHTTPServerTransport — session resumption not supported
Branch History deduplication now uses updatedAt + 2min heuristic — may incorrectly include/exclude commits near session end boundary
The gossamer-testing worktree sync process is manual and error-prone — consider a watch script or symlinks for source files
